atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right middle finger pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain began four days after a motor vehicle accident

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as significant

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness with palpation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the accident involved the trunk crumpling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports himself 'flipping the bird' at the other driver

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any other injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking digoxin for atrial fibrillation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no other relevant medical history

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger or third finger

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to continue the patient on digoxin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a finger splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up x-ray.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up x-ray in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician counsels the patient on the importance of adhering to the follow-up appointment.
